question: How many battles did not lose any ship with tonnage '225'?
gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM battle WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT lost_in_battle FROM ship WHERE tonnage  =  '225' );
predicted_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM battle WHERE key NOT IN (SELECT T1.attr_1c9a44_in_attr_a5101e FROM ship AS T1 JOIN death AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.attr_68ebfd_by_attr_2a3f11_key WHERE T1.attr_d5189d = 225)
raw_response: SELECT count(*) FROM battle WHERE key NOT IN (SELECT T1.attr_1c9a44_in_attr_a5101e FROM ship AS T1 JOIN death AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.attr_68ebfd_by_attr_2a3f11_key WHERE T1.attr_d5189d = 225)
